articles.title: How The Fortescue (ASX:FMG) Story Is Shifting With New Price Targets And Assumptions
articles.summary: Fortescue’s latest analyst update cuts the price target by A$1.20 to A$17.20, alongside a small trim to the modelled fair value estimate. Analysts linking this shift to lower long term commodity price assumptions see the new target as both a response to a tougher pricing backdrop and a way to align Fortescue with refreshed sectorwide models that include copper, aluminum and gold. articles.summary: Wondering if Fortescue shares at around A$19.68 are offering good value right now, or if the easy gains are already behind you?
